---
name: validation-reporting
description: Summarize delivered validation evidence, remaining gaps, and residual risk so feature completion is documented clearly and traceably.
---

# Validation Reporting

## Use For

- summarizing what was validated for a feature
- recording evidence, gaps, and residual risk

## Read First

- `delivery/governance/definition-of-done.md`
- `delivery/governance/traceability.md`
- `templates/validation-report.template.md`

## Outputs

- validation report
- acceptance-criteria coverage summary
- known gaps and issues
